basic_details.job_title: IIM Tiruchirappalli Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Tiruchirappalli (IIM Tiruchirappalli) has released the official Academic Associate Notification 2026 under Advt. No. EST-II/A-02/2026/002. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced under the IIM Tiruchirappalli Academic Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years (for Ph.D. holders) and 30 years (for non-Ph.D. candidates) with a Ph.D. or Graduate/Postgraduate degree in relevant fields along with the required experience can apply online on or before 10 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available belo

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: With Ph.D. - 35 years, without Ph.D. - 30 years
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for candidates with a Ph.D. Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for candidates without a Ph.D. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD or Graduates/Post Graduates in relevant fields with experience. Specific qualifications vary by area.
qualification.details: Academic Associate - Economics & Public Policy: PhD with or without experience; Graduates or Post Graduates in Economics or Allied fields; B. Tech./B.E with adequate experience. Experience in Teaching or comparative Research experience is desirable but not mandatory. Academic Associate - Finance and Accounting: PhD with or without experience; M.B.A or equivalent with a first class with specialization in finance and accounting; M.Com with first class with specialization in computer applications. Candidates with a PhD or registered for a PhD in relevant disciplines of finance or accounting will be preferred. Academic Associate - General Management: PhD with or without experience; M.B.A or equivalent with a first class. Candidates with a background in Law, an interest in law, or an interest in the legal aspects of business are an added qualification. Academic Associate - Information Systems and Analytics: PhD (with expertise in Information Systems, Analytics) with or without experience; Post-graduates (MBA with specialization in Information Technology and Systems, Analytics / post-graduates in Information Technology or related fields); B. Tech./B.E (in computer science or related fields)/MCA with adequate experience. One-year post qualification experience either in academics or industry is required. Experience of work in an institute of higher education/research is desirable. Academic Associate - Strategy & Entrepreneurship: PhD with or without experience; An MBA or Master's Degree in Economics, Psychology, Sociology or a related degree; Good Academic Record. Candidates with a Background in Law or an interest towards law or an interest in legal aspects of business are an added qualification. Academic Associate - Marketing: PhD with or without experience; First-class post-graduates (MBA with specialization in the relevant field / post-graduates in the relevant field). One-year post-qualification experience either in academics or industry is required. Academic Associate - Operations Management & Decision Sciences: PhD with or without experience; B.E. (any branch) from a recognized institution of repute; B.Sc (or) M.Sc in Mathematics (or) Statistics; M.B.A. with specialization has taken a significant number of elective courses on Operations Management / Decision Sciences / Analytics. Although 1 to 3 years of work experience in a similar role is desirable, fresh graduates with energy and enthusiasm are encouraged to apply. Prior experience in teaching/educational institutions is preferred but not essential.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Academic Associate - Information Systems and Analytics
Academic Associate - Operations Management and Decision Sciences

Academic Associate - Operations Management and Decision Sciences

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 30,000/- per month for Ph.D. holders, Rs. 25,000/- per month for others.
salary_details.details: Rs. 30,000/- per month for candidates with a Ph.D. Rs. 25,000/- per month for candidates without a Ph.D. Candidates without the requisite experience may be considered on merit, but at a lower stipend.

selection_process: Written test Skill test Personal interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Tiruchirappalli Academic Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Tiruchirappalli to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

Candidates with a PhD or registered for a PhD in relevant disciplines of finance or accounting will be preferred. Candidates with a background in Law, an interest in law, or an interest in the legal aspects of business are an added qualification. Tech./B.E (in computer science or related fields)/MCA with adequate experience. One-year post qualification experience either in academics or industry is required. Experience of work in an institute of higher education/research is desirable. Academic Associate - Strategy & Entrepreneurship: PhD with or without experience; An MBA or Master's Degree in Economics, Psychology, Sociology or a related degree; Good Academic Record. Candidates with a Background in Law or an interest towards law or an interest in legal aspects of business are an added qualification. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Tiruchirappalli Academic Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Tiruchirappalli to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Tiruchirappalli Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Associate position at IIM Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for the Academic Associate position at IIM Tiruchirappalli is July 10, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies available for the Academic Associate post at IIM Tiruchirappalli.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: The educational qualification varies by area but generally includes PhD or Graduates/Post Graduates in relevant fields with experience. Specific details are provided in the eligibility criteria section.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The age limit is 35 years for candidates with a Ph.D. and 30 years for candidates without a Ph.D.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Academic Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 30,000/- per month for Ph.D. holders and Rs. 25,000/- per month for others.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Academic Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test, a skill test, and a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with a Master's degree apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a Master's degree in relevant fields and adequate experience are eligible to apply, as specified in the eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for the Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: The application mode is strictly online through the official recruitment portal of IIM Tiruchirappalli.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available in the Important Links section of this article.
